examples.title: Algorithm: Audio Playback
examples.description: Pseudocode demonstrating audio playback using MediaPlayer
examples.code:
ALGORITHM AudioPlayback
INPUT: audioFile
OUTPUT: None

BEGIN
 mediaPlayer = new MediaPlayer()
 mediaPlayer.setDataSource(audioFile)
 mediaPlayer.prepareAsync()
 mediaPlayer.setOnPreparedListener(onPreparedListener)
 mediaPlayer.start()
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step pseudocode for playing audio using MediaPlayer
